can someone give a brief rundown of how caro furnace works
Every turn end. You gain hp in that furnace based on your max hp
On demand you can click that well and heal up
There is one unit that cares about the furnace named Salvador but I won't bore you with him for now
Just use it when you see it's full or save it and use it after you selfharmed with Caro units (they have current health selfharming)
There are many relics that can give you furnace. One for example it literally converts the damage you take into health for it
